creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu, Jul 16, 2009 at 10:20:04PM +0000, Hugo Leisink wrote:
>  I don't have enough FreeBSD knowledge to solve this problem. I can use 
>  some help on this one.

This URL details what you need to do:
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/plist-config.html

If you need further assistance with it please let me know and I can come
up with a patch when time permits, but I think it's best for you, as
maintainer, to learn it. :)

I've gone ahead and assigned this PR to myself so that I can keep track
of it and work with you if you need further help.

-- WXS
